name: Farley Mount
overview: Farley Mount is a hill and country park west of Winchester rather than a conventional residential village, and the current RG25/Basingstoke seed appears mismatched with that geography. Existing references point to Farley Mount monument and country park context, while postcode/location references in the record indicate likely source-data error. This record should remain flagged for dataset correction before full residential profiling.
character: Non-residential country-park / downland landmark context; not a normal village-centre settlement profile.
amenities: Country-park style open land and waymarked walking routes
Primary day-to-day amenities accessed in Winchester/Sparsholt/Stockbridge corridor
Rural lanes and viewpoints are the core local draw
